opsworks.layer.recipes.Configure.Description: An array of custom recipe names to be run following a `configure` event.

opsworks.layer.recipes.Deploy.Description: An array of custom recipe names to be run following a `deploy` event.

opsworks.layer.recipes.Setup.Description: An array of custom recipe names to be run following a `setup` event.

opsworks.layer.recipes.Shutdown.Description: An array of custom recipe names to be run following a `shutdown` event.

opsworks.layer.recipes.Undeploy.Description: An array of custom recipe names to be run following a `undeploy` event.
